name: io.github.lildaddyo/braintube-mcp
title: BrainTube
description: Personal AI knowledge base — ingest YouTube, articles, Notion, Obsidian, and Readwise into a searchable graph with deep search, concept extraction, and knowledge-health analytics.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token from your BrainTube API key (Settings → API Keys on brain-tube.com).
